name: Apptainer Run Container
summary: Run Apptainer containers safely on shared HPC systems.
description: This skill provides templates for executing Apptainer or Singularity images under Slurm with explicit bind mounts, working directories, and optional GPU support.

tools.name: apptainer
tools.notes: Singularity can be substituted on sites that have not migrated.

inputs.name: image
inputs.description: SIF image or OCI URI supported by the site.

inputs.name: binds
inputs.description: Host paths to bind into the container.

outputs.name: container_job
outputs.description: A Slurm job or command line that runs the containerized workload.

examples.title: Run a container job under Slurm

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example scripts.
Run apptainer exec against a known SIF image and verify user id, working directory, and bind mounts.
